title: phyllorkis mishmeensis
intro: Phyllorkis mishmeensis, also known as the Mishmi orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Mishmi orchid has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, thanks to its health benefits. Herbal preparations of Phyllorkis mishmeensis are often made from its roots and leaves, which can be consumed as a decoction or used topically as a paste or poultice.
